string EntryAbility_desc 0x01000006
string EntryAbility_label 0x01000007
string app_name 0x01000002
string module_desc 0x01000008
color start_window_background 0x0100000a
media app_icon 0x01000009
media background 0x01000001
media foreground 0x01000003
media layered_image 0x01000000
media start_icon 0x01000005
profile main_pages 0x01000004
